message: 🌱 Add harbor: A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path wh mission (#458)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "harbor-12719-a-default-library-can-be-auto-appended-to-the-pull-path-when-proxyi",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path when proxying cache dockerhub ",
+    "description": "A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path when proxying cache dockerhub . This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify harbor feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=harbor\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path when proxying cache dockerhub "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Namespace configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant harbor resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get namespace -A\nkubectl describe namespace <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nNow, for pulling popular images of the docker hub, user needs to explicitly specify the `library` namespace.\n\n`docker pull 10.192.203.193/szou_proxy/library/redis:4.0`\n\nActually, we can support the sh"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path wh",
+        "description": "Check project is default project format in dockerhub\n Redirect blob/manifest request to default url\n\nThank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\n\n# Issue being fixed\nFixes #(issue)\n\nPlease indicate you've done the following:\n```yaml\n// new project as Proxy Cache in HARBOR\r\n${HARBOR}/library: proxy_cache(\"docker.io\", \"/library\")\r\n\r\n${HARBOR}/library/nginx:latest => docker.io/library/nginx:latest\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm A default `library` can be auto appended to the pu is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: Check project is default project format in dockerhub\n Redirect blob/manifest request to default url\n\nThank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\n\n# Issue being fixed\nFixes #(issue)\n\nPlease indicate you've done the following:. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "// new project as Proxy Cache in HARBOR\r\n${HARBOR}/library: proxy_cache(\"docker.io\", \"/library\")\r\n\r\n${HARBOR}/library/nginx:latest => docker.io/library/nginx:latest",
+        "// new project as Proxy Cache in HARBOR_PROXY\r\n${HARBOR_PROXY}/docker.io: proxy_cache(\"docker.io\", \"\")\r\n// new project as Proxy Cache in HARBOR_INTERNAL\r\n${HARBOR_INTERNAL}/docker.io: proxy_cache(\"${HARBOR_PROXY}\", \"/docker.io\")\r\n\r\n${HARBOR_INTERNAL}/docker.io/library/busybox \r\n=> ${HARBOR_PROXY}/docker.io/library/busybox\r\n=> docker.io/library/busybox",
+        "docker pull $HARBOR_SERVER/library/nginx"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "harbor",
+      "community",
+      "container-registry",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "harbor"

+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "issue": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/12719",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/pull/17537"
+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
